_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Event | Status | What the Workspace Must Have Done |
|---|---|---|---|
| In force | LEED v5 current version for all commercial projects including warehouses | In force as of USGBC March 2026 update | Any new facility leased from a LEED-pursuing developer will be assessed under v5 |
| In force | NYC LL84/97 — benchmarking and carbon caps for buildings >25,000 sqft | In force | Confirm whether any NYC facilities trigger tenant data obligations |
| In force | LA EWEO — benchmarking for commercial buildings >20,000 sqft | In force | Confirm whether any LA facilities trigger tenant data obligations |
| In force | UK MEES — EPC E minimum for commercial leases | In force | Confirm EPC rating of all UK facilities; Legal Confirmation Required |
| In force | Singapore BCA Green Mark — mandatory for new commercial buildings | In force | Factor into any Singapore facility selection |
| In force | UAE Estidama Pearl — mandatory for new buildings (Abu Dhabi) | In force | Factor into any UAE facility selection |
| 2027 (proposed) | UK MEES EPC C uplift for commercial properties | Proposed; Legal Confirmation Required on current legislative status | Lease renewals in England/Wales: confirm EPC trajectory before signing |
| 2030 (proposed) | UK MEES EPC B uplift for commercial properties | Proposed; Legal Confirmation Required | Long-term UK lease commitments: factor EPC B trajectory into facility selection |
| 2050 | EU EPBD — all buildings zero-emission | Adopted at EU level; member state transposition ongoing | Monitor transposed national standards in each EU country of operation |
| No date published | LEED v5 warehouse-specific Project Priority credits | In development per USGBC March 2026 | Monitor USGBC Project Priority Library |
| No date published | Australia NABERS — warehouse expansion | Under consultation | Monitor for mandatory warehouse application date |

*Sources: USGBC March 2026; UK MEES https://www.gov.uk/guidance/domestic-private-rented-property-minimum-energy-efficiency-standard-landlord-guidance; NYC LL84/97 https://www.nyc.gov/site/buildings/codes/benchmarking.page; LA EWEO https://www.ladbs.org/services/green-building/existing-buildings; EU EPBD https://energy.ec.europa.eu; Singapore BCA Green Mark https://www1.bca.gov.sg; Estidama Pearl https://www.abudhabi.ae; NABERS https://www.nabers.gov.au*

---
